The market is up close to 100% since the hype started on the ETF and, although long-term, it's going to be massive, I don't think we'll run more.

text: When @MicroStrategy adopted a #Bitcoin Strategy, it anticipated volatility and structured its balance sheet so that it could continue to #HODL through adversity.

name: Michael Saylor
text:
MicroStrategy has a $205M term loan and needs to maintain $410M as collateral. $MSTR has 115,109 BTC that it can pledge. If the price of #BTC falls below $3,562 the company could post some other collateral. See slides 11-12 in Q1 2022 presentation. #HODL
https://t.co/9WHsIB6Usx

Moral hazard must have been at play.

text: The idea that the American government, the American taxpayer, or any American company is obligated to provide support is pure entitlement.

name: David Sacks
text: Bidenomics = pumping trillions of dollars of stimulus into a rip-roaring economy. I’m not going to pretend like I know what’s going to happen next. AFAIK we’ve never tried this before.

name: David Sacks
text: If you’re a conservative who doesn’t believe that the Fed should act decisively to stop this banking crisis, you’re being played for a sucker or a fool. The result will be the further concentration of Big Finance in a small number of politically connected firms.

name: David Sacks
text: Where is Powell? Where is Yellen? Stop this crisis NOW. Announce that all depositors will be safe. Place SVB with a Top 4 bank. Do this before Monday open or there will be contagion and the crisis will spread.

name: David Sacks
text: If the Fed doesn’t nip the bank run in the bud, regional banks will be decimated, and all that will be left is the biggest banks. You know, the “too big to fail”ones. This will not help the little guy.
